sub_pixel_system.notes: Built on Commander Keen engine; no sub-pixel data documented

special_mechanics.name: Crouch
special_mechanics.description: Player character can crouch; mechanic documented but physics parameters not specified

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Shoot, grenades, and land mines as pickups; hitscan weapons except plasma gun

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source praises lack of movement jerks and satisfying control inherited from Commander Keen engine, but no quantitative physics parameters are documented. Movement behavior described as smooth and responsive compared to contemporaneous platformers, but specific velocity, acceleration, or gravity values not available.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Bio Menace article (Gameplay section, Reception section)
